.file-embed.background: rgb(45, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(33, 35, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(40, 42, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(40, 42, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(221, 8%, 35%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(221, 8%, 35%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(221, 8%, 35%) 65%, transparent))
body.--font-monospace:
'??', '??', "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas,
    "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace
body.--mono:
"SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas,
    "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, hsl(221, 8%, 35%) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(hsl(221, 8%, 35%), color-mix(in srgb, hsl(221, 8%, 35%) 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(40, 42, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(40, 42, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", "??", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(40, 42, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(33, 35, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(33, 35, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(200, 100, 100) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(40, 42, 47) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(33, 35, 39) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(63, 67, 74) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(45, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: "??", "??", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

pre.background: rgb(45, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(45, 47, 52) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", "??", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", "Source Code Pro", Menlo, Consolas, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

tr.background: rgb(54, 57, 63) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
